name: Legacy - Reawakening
short_description: Point-and-click adventure game filled with unique puzzles and atmospheric exploration. Journey deep underground into a mysterious forgotten place and uncover the secrets hidden within.
detailed_description:
Legacy - Reawakening is a point-and-click adventure inspired by the classics of the '90s. Explore mysterious locations, solve puzzles, and uncover the secrets of a long-lost world.

You play as an explorer transported to an ancient ruin hidden beneath a mountain. As you dig deeper into the ruins, you discover a massive machine—an ancient robot that has lost all memory of its past. By solving puzzles and finding memory shards scattered throughout the temple, you slowly help it remember what happened here… and why you were brought to this place.

The game features a huge number of handcrafted puzzles, each one unique. From mechanical contraptions and logic challenges to environmental riddles and hidden mechanisms, every puzzle offers a fresh twist—no two are alike. It's a game built for players who love experimenting, observing, and thinking outside the box.

With no combat and no time pressure, Legacy Reawakening is about curiosity, discovery, and the satisfaction of solving things on your own.
And if you ever get stuck, a built-in hint system will gently nudge you in the right direction—and eventually reveal the full solution if needed.

Immersive 3D graphics

  • Massive world with very long gameplay

  • Point and click adventure

  • Dynamic hint system that nudges you in the right direction

  • 8 langauges supported: English, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Swedish, Korean and Japanese

  • In game camera lets you take notes wherever you are


Manipulate the elements using unique mechanics
